tabSwitch.title: Unsaved changes
tabSwitch.description: You have unsaved changes on this tab. Guardar them, discard them, or stay on this tab?

navAway.title: Unsaved changes
navAway.description: Leaving this page will discard your unsaved changes.

pageHeader.title: Diseño
pageHeader.subtitle: Customize your Space's navigation tabs. Rename, reorder, and manage post assignments.

discardChangesDialog.title: Descartar cambios?
discardChangesDialog.description: Your unsaved Diseño changes will be reverted to the last saved state. This cannot be undone.

postDescriptionDisplay.title: Post description display
postDescriptionDisplay.description: Collapse post descriptions by default. When enabled, descriptions show a "Read more" link instead of the full text.

column.empty: No callouts in this column yet.

dialog.title: Añadir una nueva fase
dialog.description: Crea una nueva fase de flujo de innovación. Podrás renombrarla o eliminarla más tarde.
dialog.duplicate: Ya existe una fase con este nombre.
dialog.errorGeneric: No se pudo crear la fase. Inténtalo de nuevo.

pageHeader.title: Comunidad
pageHeader.subtitle: Manage members, organizations, and virtual contributors in this space.

organizations.title: Miembro Organizaciones
organizations.name: Nombre
organizations.description: Todosow members from specific organizations to join automatically.
organizations.hint: Users from these organizations can join without admin approval.

addDialog.title: Añadir Organization
addDialog.description: Pick an organization whose members can join this space without approval.

virtualContributors.title: Colaboradores virtuales
virtualContributors.name: Nombre
virtualContributors.description: Manage AI agents and bots participating in this space.

addDialog.title: Añadir Virtual Contributor
addDialog.description: Pick a virtual contributor from this account to add to the space.
addDialog.empty: No virtual contributors available on this account.

addExternalDialog.title: Invitar External Virtual Contributor
addExternalDialog.description: Invitar a virtual contributor from the Alkemio library. The owner will have to accept the invitation.
addExternalDialog.empty: No library virtual contributors match your search.

applicationForm.title: Formulario de solicitud
applicationForm.description: Customize the questions users must answer when applying to join this space.

guidelines.title: Normas de la comunidad
guidelines.description: Establish rules and expectations for member behavior.
guidelines.hint: Displayed to new members upon joining.
guidelines.placeholder: Describe your space's code of conduct…

user.title: Quitar member
user.description: Quitar {{name}} from this space? They will lose access immediately.

applicationReject.title: Rechazar solicitud
applicationReject.description: Reject {{name}}'s application to join this space?

invite.title: Invitar Miembros
invite.description: Invitar an existing Alkemio member by picking from the list, or invite someone new by email.

pageHeader.title: Subespacios
pageHeader.subtitle: Editar the Subespacios in this Space. Configure default templates and view all existing subspaces.

defaultTemplate.title: Default Subspace Template
defaultTemplate.description: Choose the default settings that will apply when creating a new Subspace within this Space.

dialog.title: Change Default Subspace Template
dialog.intro: Customize the default Template for newly created Subespacios.
dialog.description: Below you can choose between the Plantillas collected in the Space Template Library. If you're looking to create new Plantillas or explore additional Plantillas, <library>click here</library> to access this library.

subspaces.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your search or filters.

deleteDialog.title: Eliminar subespacio
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

saveAsTemplate.title: Create new Space Template

profile.title: Template description
profile.help: This description will be visible to anyone browsing templates. It is not part of the template content itself.

fields.tagsPlaceholder: Añadir a tag and press Enter

urlLoader.description: Paste the URL of a space or subspace to use its collaboration content as the basis of this template.

errors.required: Paste the URL of the space you want to copy as a template.
errors.invalidUrl: This URL does not point to a space.
errors.noRights: You need admin rights on the space you want to copy as a template.

saveAsTemplate.recursive: Also include subspaces of the selected space in the template

preview.info: Always included: Acerca de information & Ajustes

errors.nameTooShort: Template name must be at least 3 characters

dialog.title: Create new Subspace
dialog.subtitle: Set up a new workspace within this space.

template.label: Template
template.hint: Optional — pick a subspace template to pre-fill content.

displayName.label: Nombre
displayName.hint: The name of your subspace, visible to members.

tagline.label: Lema
tagline.hint: A short subtitle describing the subspace.

description.label: Descripción
description.hint: Explain what this subspace is about. Markdown supported.

tags.label: Etiquetas
tags.hint: Etiquetas help members find this subspace.

visuals.tooSmall: Image is too small. Minimum {{width}} × {{height}} px required.

pageHeader.title: Actualizaciones from the Líders
pageHeader.subtitle: Post announcements, milestones, and progress updates visible to all space members.

deleteDialog.title: Eliminar update
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this update? This cannot be undone.

pageHeader.title: Plantillas
pageHeader.subtitle: Manage templates for spaces, collaboration tools, whiteboards, posts, and community guidelines.

templates.selectFromLibrary: Select a template from the platform library
templates.noTemplatesHint: Try searching for a different term or create a new template.

edit.title: Editar template
edit.name: Nombre
edit.tagsPlaceholder: Añadir a tag and press Enter
edit.postDefaultPlaceholder: Shown pre-filled when members create a post from this template…

deleteDialog.title: Eliminar plantilla
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

pageHeader.title: Ajustes
pageHeader.subtitle: Configure your space's visibility, membership policies, and allowed member actions.

visibility.title: Visibility
visibility.description: Control who can see and access this space
visibility.publicDescription: This Space and its contents are visible to everyone on the platform. Users can only contribute if they are a member.
visibility.privateDescription: This Space is visible to everyone on the platform, but the content is only visible to members.
visibility.hint: Consider your space's purpose and audience when choosing visibility.

membership.title: Miembroship
membership.description: Choose how users join your space
membership.openDescription: Todos Space members can directly join, without you having to review their applications.
membership.openHint: Best for public, open collaboration spaces
membership.applicationDescription: If people want to become a member, they have to fill in the application form. You receive their applications (see community tab here) and you can accept them or reject them.
membership.applicationHint: Best for curated spaces with specific requirements
membership.invitationDescription: Users can only become a member after you've invited them. There is no 'apply' or 'join' button for others to click.
membership.invitationHint: Best for private, restricted collaboration teams
membership.hostOrgTrust: Todosow members of {{host}} to join this Space without an application.

applicationForm.title: Formulario de solicitud
applicationForm.description: This section allows you to modify the questions for users applying to the Space. Please note that these questions will only be shown when the membership options (in the block above) are set to "Applications required".

deleteConfirm.title: Eliminar question
deleteConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to remove this question?

allowedActions.title: Todosowed Acciones
allowedActions.description: Choose which actions members can perform in this space
allowedActions.inheritMembershipRightsDescription: Los miembros del Espacio padre obtienen acceso automáticamente a este Subespacio.

pageHeader.title: Almacenamiento
pageHeader.subtitle: Browse and manage documents stored in this space.

deleteDialog.title: Eliminar document
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

pageHeader.title: Cuenta
pageHeader.subtitle: Here you find all your Spaces, Colaboradores virtuales, and other hosted resources. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to the Alkemio team.

url.title: URL
url.hint: The unique URL for this space. Contact Alkemio to change this.

visibility.title: Visibility Estado
visibility.contact: For status changes, contact the Alkemio team.

host.title: Anfitrión Information
host.description: The host is the person or organization that owns this space.

support.title: Support
support.message: If you want to change any of these settings, please contact the Alkemio team.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Permanently delete this space and all its content.

deleteDialog.title: Eliminar Space
deleteDialog.description: This will permanently delete this space and all its content. This action cannot be undone.

name.title: Space Nombre
name.description: The public name of your space.

tagline.title: Lema
tagline.description: A short subtitle shown next to the space name.

branding.title: Space Branding
branding.description: Subir an avatar, a page banner (1536×256), and a card banner (416×256).

pageBanner.title: Page Banner (1536 × 256px)
pageBanner.hint: Shown at the top of the Space page.

cardBanner.title: Card Banner (416 × 256px)
cardBanner.hint: Shown in search results and space cards.

location.title: Ubicación
location.description: The city and country of this space.

what.title: What
what.description: Describe what this space is about.

why.title: Why
why.description: Explain the motivation or value of this space.

who.title: Who
who.description: Describe the target audience or ideal members.

tags.title: Etiquetas
tags.description: Etiquetas help members discover your space.

references.title: References & Links
references.description: External links shown on this space page.
